name: Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
2. Add sugar to the dry ingredients and mix well.
3. Beat eggs in a separate bowl, then add oil, grated carrots, crushed pineapple with juice, and walnuts.
4. Pour the egg mixture into the dry ingredient mixture and stir until combined.
5. Grease an oblong baking pan and pour the batter into it.
6. Bake for 40-45 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
7. Frosting: In a separate bowl, beat softened cream cheese and butter until smooth. Gradually add powdered sugar, adding milk if desired to reach a spreadable consistency.
8. Once the cake has cooled, spread the frosting evenly over the top.
This recipe is adapted from one shared by a colleague. For a lower fat content, consider substituting an equal amount of applesauce for some or all of the oil.
